title: Build OVO 2D Platformer with Levels and Portals

requirements.text: Implement core 2D platformer mechanics in useOvoGame.ts including smooth running, jumping, wall-jumping, sliding, coyote time, and gravity-based physics for the player character.
acceptanceCriteria: Player can run left and right with smooth acceleration and deceleration
Player can jump with realistic gravity arc
Wall-jump and slide mechanics are functional
Coyote time allows brief jump window after walking off a platform edge

requirements.text: Design and implement at least 10 platformer levels in useOvoGame.ts with increasing difficulty, varied platform layouts, hazards, gaps, and moving platforms.

quotes: Multiple levels with increasing difficulty and varied platform layouts

acceptanceCriteria: At least 10 distinct levels are defined
Each level has a unique platform layout
Difficulty visibly increases across levels (wider gaps, more hazards, more complex paths)
Levels load correctly in sequence

requirements.text: Implement portal objects in useOvoGame.ts that, when the player touches them, teleport the player to a specified target position within the same level or to the start of a specified level.

quotes: teleport the player to another location/level
Portals that teleport the player to another location or the next level

acceptanceCriteria: Portal objects are placed in level definitions with a target position or target level
Player is instantly teleported when touching a portal
Portals are visually distinct (e.g., glowing ring or swirl animation) on the canvas
Portals can target a different coordinate in the same level or jump to a new level

requirements.text: Implement a level exit/end goal in each level in useOvoGame.ts. When the player reaches the exit, they progress to the next level. After the final level, the game is considered complete and the score (time elapsed) is submitted.

quotes: Level goal: reach the end/exit to progress to the next stage

acceptanceCriteria: Each level has a clearly marked exit object
Touching the exit transitions the player to the next level
Completing the final level triggers the game-complete state
A timer tracks elapsed time as the score

requirements.text: Update OvoGame.tsx to render portals on the canvas with a visually distinctive animated appearance (e.g., pulsing glow or swirl), display the current level number, and show a game-complete screen with score submission and leaderboard when all levels are finished.
acceptanceCriteria: Portals are drawn with an animated visual effect on the canvas each frame
Current level number is displayed in the HUD
Game-complete overlay appears after the final level with elapsed time score
Score submission and leaderboard components are shown on completion

constraints: All game logic must remain in frontend/src/hooks/useOvoGame.ts and frontend/src/pages/OvoGame.tsx
Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Use HTML5 canvas for rendering, consistent with the existing OvoGame.tsx pattern
nonGoals: 3D rendering — this is a 2D canvas game
New pages or routes beyond the existing OVO route
